products.name: Teak Canopy Bed
products.description: A majestic canopy bed frame handcrafted from solid teak wood with elegant carved posts and a warm natural finish. Designed to be the centrepiece of your bedroom.

products.name: Rustic Canopy Bed
products.description: A rustic canopy bed made from reclaimed wood with a beautifully weathered patina. Raw natural beauty meets comfortable modern living.

products.name: Resin River Dining Table
products.description: A stunning live-edge dining table featuring a vibrant turquoise resin river flowing through naturally contoured walnut slabs. Seats six comfortably.

products.name: Solid Wood Dining Table
products.description: A classic solid wood dining table crafted from premium sheesham with a hand-rubbed oil finish that highlights exquisite grain patterns.

products.name: Marble Top Center Table
products.description: An elegant center table with a natural marble top set on a sculptural wooden base. The contrast of stone and wood creates a sophisticated focal point.

products.name: Round Resin Center Table
products.description: A mesmerizing round center table featuring deep blue and turquoise resin art encapsulated within a solid wood frame.

products.name: Petrified Wood Side Table
products.description: A rare petrified wood side table where ancient wood has been naturally transformed into stone over millions of years. The polished top reveals mesmerizing fossil patterns.

products.name: Wooden Log Side Table
products.description: A charming hand-carved log side table made from a solid tree trunk section, polished to reveal stunning natural rings and textures.

products.name: Teak Root Console Table
products.description: A dramatic console table crafted from a naturally formed teak root system, mounted on a sleek metal base. Each piece is a unique sculptural statement.

products.name: Rustic Console Table
products.description: A beautifully weathered console table featuring reclaimed wood with a natural patina, supported by hand-forged iron legs.

products.name: Live Edge Slab Table
products.description: An organic live-edge table crafted from a single slab of seasoned teak wood, finished with a natural oil that highlights the wood's warm golden tones.

products.name: Papermesh Floor Lamp
products.description: A statement floor lamp wrapped in hand-layered papier-mâché with intricate texture work. Emits a warm, diffused glow through the organic surface.

products.name: Papermesh Pendant Light
products.description: A delicate hanging pendant crafted from layered papier-mâché in an organic bell shape. Casts beautiful shadow patterns on surrounding walls.

products.name: Wooden Tripod Floor Lamp
products.description: A contemporary wooden tripod floor lamp with hand-turned legs and a natural linen drum shade. Warm ambient lighting for bedside or living spaces.

products.name: Woven Rattan Pendant
products.description: A beautifully woven rattan pendant light that casts intricate shadow patterns. Handmade using traditional weaving techniques for bohemian interiors.

products.name: Bamboo Pendant Cluster
products.description: A cluster of three bamboo pendant lights in varying sizes, each handwoven to create a warm, natural glow. Sustainable and stylish.

products.name: Papermesh Accent Bench
products.description: A unique accent bench featuring a papier-mâché sculpted seat on a solid wood frame. A functional art piece for entryways and reading nooks.

products.name: Rustic Wooden Bench
products.description: A solid wooden bench crafted from reclaimed railway sleeper wood with a natural weathered finish. Perfect for rustic and industrial interiors.

products.name: Live Edge Bench
products.description: An organic live-edge bench carved from a single slab of acacia, set on minimalist metal legs. Each piece showcases the wood's natural contours.

products.name: Teak Accent Chair
products.description: A beautifully sculpted accent chair in solid teak with a woven cane seat back. Classic mid-century design meets artisan craftsmanship.

products.name: Wooden Lounge Chair
products.description: A handcrafted lounge chair made from steam-bent solid wood with ergonomic curves. The natural grain serves as the only decoration this piece needs.
